仅开发模式可用: 总开关。关闭后不会自动入队或执行 AI 翻译，已存在译文仍可按读取逻辑展示。
Available in developer mode only: Master switch. When disabled, no AI translation tasks are enqueued or executed automatically; existing translations can still be displayed by the read logic.

仅开发模式可用: 文档导入事实源固定为 zh_Hans_CN，不提供界面配置；翻译结果只写数据库，不回写模块 doc 文件。
Available in developer mode only: The document import source of truth is fixed to zh_Hans_CN and is not configurable in the UI; translation results are stored only in the database and are not written back to module doc files.

仅开发模式可用: 支持语言决定前台/后台语言选择器可选项；AI 自动补齐决定该语言缺失或过期时是否进入异步翻译队列。
Available in developer mode only: Supported languages determine the options shown in frontend and backend language selectors. AI auto-fill determines whether missing or stale translations for that language enter the async translation queue.

仅开发模式可用: 开启后，缺失译文或源文档更新导致过期时会进入翻译队列；不会同步阻塞当前页面访问。
Available in developer mode only: When enabled, missing translations or translations made stale by source document updates enter the translation queue. Page access is not blocked synchronously.

仅开发模式可用: 控制哪些类型会被自动入队翻译。普通文档、API 文档、目录树互相独立；全不勾选时即使语言开启也不会产生翻译任务。
Available in developer mode only: Controls which content types are automatically enqueued for translation. Regular documents, API documents, and catalog trees are independent. If none are selected, no translation tasks are created even when languages are enabled.

仅开发模式可用: 开发文档列表和详情页中的普通模块文档。
Available in developer mode only: Regular module documents in the developer documentation list and detail pages.

仅开发模式可用: API 文档页的接口标题、摘要、参数说明、响应说明等由导入器生成的文档内容。
Available in developer mode only: Importer-generated API documentation content such as endpoint titles, summaries, parameter descriptions, and response descriptions.

仅开发模式可用: 左侧目录节点名称和描述。关闭后目录仍显示源语言或已有译文，不会自动补齐新译文。
Available in developer mode only: Names and descriptions of left-side catalog nodes. When disabled, the catalog still shows source text or existing translations, but new translations are not auto-filled.

仅开发模式可用: 文档翻译适配器使用的文本模型。模型上下文大小会影响单篇大文档如何自动拆分成多次 AI 请求。
Available in developer mode only: Text model used by the document translation adapter. The model context size affects how a large document is split into multiple AI requests.

仅开发模式可用: 每次定时任务或手动执行最多处理的翻译任务数量。它不是文档总数，也不是单篇大文档的 AI 分段大小；大文档分段由适配器按模型上下文自动处理。
Available in developer mode only: Maximum number of translation tasks processed by each scheduled or manual run. It is not the total number of documents and not the AI segment size for one large document; large-document splitting is handled automatically by the adapter based on model context.

仅开发模式可用: 单个翻译任务遇到网络、限流等可重试错误时允许自动重试的最大次数。格式错误、配置缺失等不可重试错误不会无限重试。
Available in developer mode only: Maximum automatic retries for one translation task after retryable errors such as network failures or rate limits. Non-retryable errors such as invalid response format or missing configuration are not retried indefinitely.

仅开发模式可用: 单篇源文档允许进入 AI 翻译链路的安全上限。超过模型单次上下文时会自动拆分请求；超过这里的业务上限才会被阻止。
Available in developer mode only: Safety limit for one source document entering the AI translation pipeline. If it exceeds the model's single-request context, requests are split automatically; only documents exceeding this business limit are blocked.

仅开发模式可用: 目标语言译文缺失、待翻译、失败或过期时的读取策略。回退源文档会显示中文源内容；空内容会让前台显示为空或由页面自行处理。
Available in developer mode only: Read policy when the target-language translation is missing, pending, failed, or stale. Fallback to source shows Chinese source content; empty content leaves the frontend empty or lets the page handle it.

仅开发模式可用: 当天文档翻译任务累计 token 达到该值后停止继续执行。填 0 表示不限制。
Available in developer mode only: Stops executing document translation tasks when today's accumulated token usage reaches this value. Use 0 for unlimited.

仅开发模式可用: 当月文档翻译任务累计 token 达到该值后停止继续执行。填 0 表示不限制。
Available in developer mode only: Stops executing document translation tasks when this month's accumulated token usage reaches this value. Use 0 for unlimited.

仅开发模式可用: 开启后，非源语言页面会显示 missing、pending、translated、stale、failed 等状态，方便调试；源语言页面不显示 translated 状态。
Available in developer mode only: When enabled, non-source-language pages show statuses such as missing, pending, translated, stale, and failed for debugging. Source-language pages do not show translated status.
